body: Now that we have a method to compute skin temperature implicitly, we do not need a custom `sea_ice_simulation` constructor anymore.  Let's use the one in ClimaOcean, so we are sure we are using the same method.
title: Remove custom `sea_ice_simulation`

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Restrict the Thermodynamics compat a little more, so we have have 1.0.x, but not 1.y.x where y > 0.

Adding the tilde in a compat entry makes the restriction more similar to the behavior when a version has a leading zero, which is what we're more used to (see [julia docs](https://pkgdocs.julialang.org/v1/compatibility/#Tilde-specifiers)).

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Recently we've seen very long wait times for GPUs on central. This PR removes some GPU runs from the buildkite pipeline to reduce our dependence on those GPUs.

I selected these runs to remove because I think we're still testing all functionality - e.g. land albedo from function, AMIP + bucket, CMIP coupling are all still exercised.  The perfect model calibration isn't used anymore, and better calibration testing will be added in https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/pull/1793

I left the CMIP + bucket config in the repo even though the job is removed, since it's useful to have that case available for debugging.
